message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam notePadding 10
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam noteBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam noteFontColor #000000
skinparam noteFontSize 12
skinparam noteFontStyle plain
skinparam noteTextAlignment left
skinparam noteShadowing false
skinparam noteBorderThickness 1
skinparam noteCornerRadius 0
skinparam noteMargin 5
skinparam notePadding 10
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam noteBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam noteFontColor #000000
skinparam noteFontSize 12
skinparam noteFontStyle plain
skinparam noteTextAlignment left
skinparam noteShadowing false
skinparam noteBorderThickness 1
skinparam noteCornerRadius 0
skinparam noteMargin 5

participant "browser" as browser
participant "proxy" as proxy
participant "backend" as backend
participant "component_config" as component_config
participant "subscription_map" as subscription_map
participant "normalized_object_map" as normalized_object_map
participant "normalized_object" as normalized_object

browser -> proxy: 1 get_state(\nconfiguration_name,\ngeo_bounding_box\n)
activate browser
activate proxy

proxy -> backend: 2 +TENANT_HEADER
activate backend

backend -> component_config: 3 component_config[configuration_name]\n.subscription_usages
activate component_config

component_config --> backend: 4 [ subscription_usage_config ]
deactivate component_config

backend -> subscription_map: 5 forEach subscription_usage_config.subscription_id
activate subscription_map

subscription_map --> backend: 6 subscription_map[subscription_id] (= normalized_object_map)
deactivate subscription_map

backend -> normalized_object_map: 7 forEach key
activate normalized_object_map

normalized_object_map --> backend: 8 normalized_object
deactivate normalized_object_map

note right of backend
forEach normalized_object:
if object.in(geo_bounding_box):
object.to_dto(
subscription_usage_config
)
end note

backend -> normalized_object: 9
activate normalized_object

normalized_object --> backend: 10 object_dto
deactivate normalized_object

backend --> proxy: 11 [ object_dto ]
deactivate backend

proxy --> browser: 12
deactivate proxy
deactivate browser

@enduml
